name: SVID Credential Harvesting
description: Rapidly harvest X.509 SVIDs via the SPIRE Workload API socket using scripting tools
real_world_relevance: Container escape followed by SPIRE Agent socket access for bulk credential harvesting

attack_flow.description: Attacker accesses the SPIRE Agent Workload API socket and makes rapid SVID fetch requests
diagram: 1. Attacker escapes container or gains node access
2. Discovers SPIRE Agent Workload API socket
3. Uses scripting tool (curl/grpcurl/python) to access socket
5. Harvests X.509 certificates and private keys

phases.name: Socket Discovery
phases.description: Find the SPIRE Workload API socket

actions.description: Verify Workload API socket is accessible

actions.command: for i in $(seq 1 12); do /opt/spire/bin/spire-agent api fetch x509 -socketPath /opt/spire/sockets/workload_api.sock -silent 2>/dev/null; done

indicators_of_compromise.description: Socket access from scripting tool (curl, python, grpcurl)
Burst of 10+ SVID requests in 60 seconds
CONFIRMED SVID burst from single PID

expected_wazuh_alerts.description: NHI: SPIRE Workload API socket access detected
NHI: Workload API access from scripting tool
NHI: Burst of SVID requests — credential harvesting
NHI: CONFIRMED SVID burst from single PID

long_term: Use network policies to isolate SPIRE Agent
